title: crepis virens var. pectinata
intro: Crepis virens var. pectinata, also known as the creeping hawk's beard or pectinate hawk's beard, is a variety of the Crepis virens plant, which belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Crepis virens var. pectinata include its potential to reduce fever, ease digestive issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are typically used to make infusions, tinctures, or teas, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
